## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass (`uv run pytest`)
- [ ] Docs updated (README if new CLI flag, CHANGELOG entry)
- [ ] Conventional commit with scope (`feat(cli): ...`, `fix(analysis): ...`)
- [ ] DCO sign-off (`git commit -s`)
- [ ] ADR created if architectural decision
- [ ] `@pytest.mark.eval` tests pass (only if changing generation logic, requires `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY`)
